createjustenoughtime.configuration.title: Create: Just Enough Time Configs
jet.text.processing_duration.desc: Raw recipe time (only some machines support this property)
jet.text.tick_duration.desc: Theoretical minimum time at maximum efficiency
jet.detail.deployer: 2 ticks slower during world interaction, and has an additional 10-tick cooldown when generating overflow items (e.g. milking)
jet.detail.saw: If the configuration "bulkCutting" is enabled, it will take %s tick / %s item
jet.detail.crushing_wheel: The higher the stack count of items, the higher the efficiency. Cooldown is extended below 250x RPM. When destroying items, there is no cooldown, and the efficiency is %s tick / 64 item
jet.detail.item_drain: The item rolling takes additional 8 tick
jet.detail.mixer: When triggering the raising and lowering animations, the cooldown is exactly 2 seconds
jet.detail.press: When processing basin recipe, there is no cooldown
jet.detail.fan: Efficiency is unrelated to RPM, taking 150 tick / 16 item
jet.detail.tesla_coil: Total consumption: %s FE; maximum charging rate: %s FE/tick. When working above a depot, there is no cooldown
jet.detail.distillation_tank: At Create 0.5.1, Estimated Duration = Processing Duration / Distillation Tower Area (rounded up)
jet.detail.distillation_tank.new: At Create 6.0.x, the size of Distillation Tower does not affect the speed
